summary: Iteration 2 delta testing (OrtoLook rebrand, new nav labels, RealSneakerSVG + color_acento accent option, Ubicaciones section). Backend: 6/6 pytest cases passed (POST/GET /api/designs with color_acento, contact CRUD, health, validation). Frontend: 34/34 Playwright checks passed - OrtoLook logo & wordmark visible in navbar, all 5 nav links present with correct labels (Inicio, Productos, Personalización, Ubicaciones, Contacto) and their smooth-scroll navigation works, live sneaker SVG updates immediately when changing color principal / suela / accent (Verde OrtoLook and Azul OrtoLook), customizer submit posts color_acento which persists in Mongo (verified via GET /api/designs -> UI record shows color_acento='Azul OrtoLook'), Ubicaciones renders 2 branch cards + 2 map iframes + 'Cómo llegar' links + WhatsApp CTA showing 334 462 1544 (href wa.me/523344621544), contact form validation + successful submit + persistence all working.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is small and well-structured; no refactor needed at this stage.
Consider adding a minimum-length validator on Contact.mensaje and Design.telefono for stricter input, but not blocking.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed rows in Mongo: 1 contact (qa_contact_iter2@test.com), 3 designs (2 via pytest, 1 via UI with color_acento='Azul OrtoLook').
context_for_next_testing_agent: All delta features (OrtoLook logo/brand, 5 nav labels including Ubicaciones, RealSneakerSVG live preview reacting to color_acento accent option, Ubicaciones with 2 branches + map iframes + Como llegar links + WhatsApp CTA 334 462 1544, /api/designs accepting and persisting color_acento) verified working end-to-end. Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is reusable for regression.
